title: The Straw Hats Turn the Raid Around
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Queen, Unknown person #7, Black Maria, Unknown person #8 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Huh? Where are you going, dahling?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The kitch- en.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: need break- fast.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's obvious this is going to be a war of attri- lion.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have to keep a full tank, even on the run.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho ho!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey. What's so funny?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My candy-sweet ladies put incredible effort into their strength and looks.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think even for a moment ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... They'd forget the importance of proper nutrition?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The kitchen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THE PANTRY!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Both locations were promptly put under strict guard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They knew you'd come here eventually, dahling.

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Ah! Sanji! Honey! There you are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Gaaah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be safe in the forest for now...

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: GTAIEEE! Spider!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: *SANJI DOES NOT DEAL WELL WITH CREEPY-CRAYLIES!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Centi- Pedes! Moths!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Daze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There he is!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make that much noise, hon, and we're sure to find you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Augh! Crap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: twenty- four hours later...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Dire straits indeed, dahling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your opponents are perfectly prepared...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eating properly balanced attack cuisine for each meal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They can simply sit back and watch as you weaken by the minute.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a battle that's as good as won.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
